---
title: "Air Analyzer"
---

# Air Analyzer

Air Analyzer is a wearable smart mask for athletes designed to measure and log breathing frequency during physical activity.

## Project overview

The system is based on an embedded low-power architecture and is intended to acquire respiratory-related signals, process them on the microcontroller, and store or transmit useful information for later analysis.

## Repository structure

```text
air_analyzer/
├── embedded/
├── micro_usb/
├── README.md
└── documentation files
## Main goals

The main goal of this project is to develop an embedded system for monitoring breathing activity using a microcontroller-based architecture.

More specifically, the project aims to:

- acquire data from the selected sensor;
- process the acquired signal on the microcontroller;
- detect useful information related to breathing activity;
- manage the firmware using an interrupt-based approach;
- provide a clear and reproducible structure for the firmware and documentation.
